mapper.select: select member_id, login_id, name, nickname, phone, gender, birth, profile_img_url, signup_type, created_at, updated_at from member where member_id = #{memberId}
select reservation_id, member_id, place_id, visitor_name, phone, visit_date, headcount, status, created_at from reservation where member_id = #{memberId} order by created_at desc
select wishlist_id, member_id, place_id, created_at from wishlist where member_id = #{memberId} order by created_at desc
mapper.update: update member set member_status = 'WITHDRAWN', deleted_at = now(), updated_at = now() where member_id = #{memberId}
